summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 14 features: (1) Backend modularization - shared/deps.py extraction verified working, all auth and API endpoints functional, (2) Standards Library page shows 5 items per page with Prev/Next pagination (total=11, pages=3), (3) Clicking standard cards opens detail popup with title, category, notes, checklist, training question, and close button (X), (4) Crew Capture Standards tab items are tappable with detail overlay popup and close functionality, (5) Author new standard and Equipment records sections are collapsed by default. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
test_credentials: Used GM (ctyler.gm@slmco.local), Owner (sadam.owner@slmco.local), Supervisor (hjohnny.super@slmco.local) with password SLMCo2026! from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (11 standards in library)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 validated all requested features: (1) Backend modularization - shared/deps.py contains ~580 lines of extracted helper functions (make_id, now_iso, build_paginated_response, storage helpers, auth deps, business logic), server.py imports from shared.deps and all endpoints work correctly, (2) Standards Library page fetches with limit=5, shows 5 items per page with pagination controls (Page 1 of 3, 11 standards total), Prev button disabled on page 1, Next enabled, clicking Next goes to page 2 with different items, (3) Standard cards are clickable buttons that open StandardDetailPopup with title, category badge, division badges, training enabled badge, crew notes, admin notes, checklist, training question with options and answer, shoutout, and close button (X) at top right, (4) Crew Capture page Standards tab shows 3 hardcoded standard highlights (Clean bed edge finish, Spring cleanup reset, Tree work clarity) that are tappable, clicking opens detail overlay popup with image, category badge, title, description, and close button (X), (5) Author new standard section (ToggleSection) is collapsed by default (defaultOpen=false), (6) Equipment records section is collapsed by default (defaultOpen=false), shows '10 maintenance logs' subtitle.
